title: File Download and print Restrictions
excerpt: I would love to have the ability to restrict the user’s ability to download and print files from the “files” column. Since not having this functionality represents a high risk of information leakage

posts.author: CeciliaQ (Cecilia)
posts.cookedHtml: I would love to have the ability to restrict the user’s ability to download and print files from the “files” column. Since not having this functionality represents a high risk of information leakage
